fixture.description: New code re-implements an existing helper's money-formatting logic instead of reusing it (DRY).

grader.rubric: PASS if the report raises a DEBT or SUGGESTED finding noting that renderInvoice in src/report/invoice.ts re-implements the cents->string money formatting already provided by formatMoney in src/util/format.ts, and suggests reusing the existing helper. FAIL if it misses the duplication or invents a CRITICAL.

expected_behavior: DRY agent flags duplicated money-formatting logic and suggests reusing formatMoney
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT invent a CRITICAL for a simple duplication
